LanguageData.Shambler.label: lobotomite
LanguageData.Shambler.description: This individual's brain has been destroyed or removed, and their body is being animated by the Big MT broadcast signal and residual FEV activity. They retain basic motor function and aggressive targeting behavior, but no cognition, no social capacity, and no sense of pain. They will attack anything not broadcasting a Big MT recognition signal until their body fails.
LanguageData.Rising.label: reactivating
LanguageData.ShamblerCorpse.label: FEV subject corpse
LanguageData.Ghoul.label: robobrain implant
LanguageData.Ghoul.description: This person has had a Big MT neural override chip implanted in their brain stem — a device originally designed to turn a living subject into a remote-controlled weapon. The chip has gone haywire. It is sending constant high-frequency motor commands that the host cannot override, causing spasmodic, violent, and uncontrollable behavior. The host is still alive inside. They just can't stop.
LanguageData.GhoulFrenzy.label: neural chip overload
LanguageData.Inhumanized.label: lobotomization
LanguageData.Inhumanized.description: This person's higher cognitive functions have been suppressed by prolonged exposure to the Big MT broadcast signal. They retain full physical and intellectual capability — they can work, research, and fight — but their emotional responses, social needs, and empathetic capacity have been overwritten. They experience the world as a series of tasks without personal meaning.\n\nThey do not suffer. They are not sure what that means anymore.
